title: Engineers' Materials
description: [TConstruct & Create]Add some fancy linkage for two mods
body:
## Main
This mod adds a variety of exclusive Tinkers' Construct materials, including Brass, Zinc, Chocolate, Cardboard, Andesite Alloy, and Rose Quartz.
And there are Tinkers' Construct modifiers:
- Wrench: Let tool work work as a wrench
- Extendo: Provides additional interaction range when on the chestplate
- AutoCrush: Let tool work as a pair of crushing wheels
- Diving Weights: Let boots work as diving boots in Create
- Goggles: Let helmet gain the function of goggles

Key gameplay features:
- Supports smelting crushed ore in the melter of TiC.
- Add Crushed Cobalt Ore for complete processing production line
- Allows mixing all kinds of Slime Balls in TiC

## Aside
This mod is from [Tinkers' Gears](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-gears), but only adds some cohesive content.You can learn from the gallery.  
Why I make this mod? That's because the contents of Tinkers' Gears are too miscellaneous.  
I am trying to split it to several mod (such as this and [Tinkers' Ponder](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-ponder)) and then I can do better in development.
